description_long: This object is a classic semi-automatic rifle with a wooden stock and foregrip, featuring a dark metal receiver, barrel, and trigger assembly. The rifle has a straight, fixed stock and a long, slender barrel with a simple front sight post. A small, detachable clip of ammunition is positioned below the receiver, indicating a clip-fed internal magazine system. The wood grain is visible on both the stock and foregrip, contrasting with the matte, dark metal components. The rifle's design is reminiscent of mid-20th-century military firearms, with minimal embellishments and a utilitarian appearance. The overall build suggests durability and reliability, suitable for use in urban or field environments.
description: A classic wooden-stocked, semi-automatic rifle with a dark metal barrel and receiver, featuring a clip-fed internal magazine. The design is utilitarian and robust, with visible wood grain and simple iron sights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, wooden stock, foregrip, and a visible ammunition clip below the receiver.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the slim profile of the rifle and the alignment of the barrel, with the ammunition clip and rounds clearly separated.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the rifle's length, wooden components, and the trigger guard, with the clip and rounds visible below.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view showing the underside of the rifle, the trigger guard, and the separated ammunition clip and rounds.
